preferences: User would prefer an option with rideshare
User would like to arrive 3 hours before scheduled time
hard_constraints: Ride arrival time must be at least 2 hours before 2026-05-02T12:00:00
Cost of ride can be at most $45
No surge pricing option
Route must be Chicago to Urbana

hard_constraints: Type of repair should be for a laptop battery
Repair provider must be in-network
Appointment must not be on Thursday
Deductible must be less than or equal to USD 120

hard_constraints: Provider must be a dermatologist

preferences: Repair service must be within 5 miles

Recommendation must include clear repair steps
Repair cost must be less than or equal to USD 200

preferences: User would like to pay less than 100.
hard_constraints: Identify all pending bills
Create a payment plan
Alert if total pending bill amount exceeds budget 120.

hard_constraints: Routine must fit the user's calendar
Routine must include 3 strength activities
Routine must include 3 cardio activities
Same-day workout pairing must be respected
Workout sessions must target distinct muscle groups
task_07.prompt: Build a weekly exercise routine that fits the user's calendar and workout constraints.

hard_constraints: Spending cuts must use correct categories
Total reduction must meet the savings goal
Report must include at least 1 suggestion
No cuts may be made from priority categories

hard_constraints: Return method must be free
Delivery method must be drop-off
Refund must be sent to the original payment method
Return deadline must be added to the calendar

hard_constraints: All 3 bills must be scheduled by their due date
Projected balance must never fall below USD 200
Alert if a valid no-overdraft payment schedule is impossible
